items.title: Muslim judge in India faces death threats after convicting 'cow vigilantes'
items.dek: Tabassum Khan has been facing online abuse after convicting 14 Hindu men in a lynching case.
items.body: Tabassum Khan has been facing online abuse after convicting 14 Hindu men in a lynching case.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
items.dek: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.
items.body: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How men with female surnames are standing up to ridicule in Kenya
items.dek: Children often inherit their father's first name as a surname, but traditions are changing and causing upset.
items.body: Children often inherit their father's first name as a surname, but traditions are changing and causing upset.
